title: Trump Threatens Action Against Iranian Ships in Strait of Hormuz
summary: President Trump vows to interdict Iranian vessels in the Strait of Hormuz due to what he calls an "illegal toll."
charlotte_impact: Escalates tensions in a critical waterway, potentially impacting global oil supply and international relations.

title: DHS Recalls Furloughed Employees Amid Shutdown
summary: The Department of Homeland Security orders furloughed employees back to work despite the ongoing government shutdown and lack of funding.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the complexities and inconsistencies of government operations during funding crises.

title: Colombia to Euthanize "Cocaine Hippos" from Pablo Escobar's Zoo
summary: Colombian authorities plan to euthanize dozens of hippos descended from those brought by Pablo Escobar, aiming to control their growing population.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the ecological consequences of exotic animal ownership and drug trafficking.
